title: Active Critical Alert: VM experiencing disk write latency - Virtual Machine
cause: The main cause for such issues are old VMware snapshots or pending snapshot consolidation, datastore/storage array being overloaded or having high latency, VM generating heavy writes like DB/log/backup activity, datastore being nearly full, and slow storage tier or incorrect disk controller.
resolution: The resolution can be to delete/consolidate snapshots, move VM/VMDK to less busy or faster datastore, check and reschedule backup jobs, free up or expand datastore space, and use faster storage/PVSCSI controller for high I/O VM.
